46 Secrets ofB irth Time Rectification
[Apart from birth time rectification, Pancha tatva method
also helps the astrologer to an extend in determining sex of
child. For example in the above example, since birth took
place in an even yama, even tatva, and odd antara tatva - it
should be a girl child, the astrologer may conclude. Similar
to birth time rectification, sex determination of native using
natal chart is a big subject, and many methods are available
for the same. Being another vast area of study, research and
discussion, that won't be discussed in this book]
Demerits of Pancha Tatva method
1) It lacks proper sage supported quotes; and thus not
authentic enough.
2) At times, dependance on Pancha Tatva method will
demand a correction of more than I 0 minutes or more
